description_long: This is a tall, slender deciduous tree with a straight, tapering trunk and sparse, angular branches extending outward at irregular intervals. The bark is a uniform brown, and the branches are mostly bare, with only a few thin twigs and no visible leaves. At the base, tufts of green grass and some exposed roots are present, giving the impression of a natural, slightly wild urban planting. The tree's structure is simple, with branches emerging alternately and at varying heights, creating an open, airy silhouette. The overall appearance suggests a young or wintertime tree, possibly recently planted in an urban park or along a sidewalk. The lack of foliage and the visible root system at the base make it stand out as a distinctive, minimalist urban tree.
description: A tall, slender tree with a straight brown trunk, sparse angular branches, and tufts of grass and roots at the base. The tree is mostly bare, with no visible leaves.
description_view_0: Front view shows the straight trunk, several angular branches, and a prominent cluster of grass and roots at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the irregular spacing of branches and the way they jut out at different angles, with the trunk's tapering shape visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the trunk, fewer visible branches, and the grass at the base appearing more compact.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals additional branches and the open, sparse arrangement of the tree's structure, with the grass base encircling the trunk.
